brand.name: Smart Space
brand.positioning_statement: Dublin's #1 Ring installer — flat-priced, no-contract, brand-agnostic professional installation across Leinster.
brand.industry: Residential security camera + video doorbell installation

primary.label: The post-Amazon installer
primary.description: Dublin or Leinster homeowner aged 45-64 who has just bought (or is about to buy) a Ring, Eufy, Tapo or Nest smart doorbell from Amazon, Currys or Harvey Norman. Has the box. Doesn't have the time, ladder, drill bit or chime-wiring confidence to fit it themselves. Wants it done this week, by someone insured, for a known price.

demographics.geography: Dublin city + suburbs + 12 Leinster counties (Wicklow, Kildare, Meath, Louth, Wexford, Carlow, Kilkenny, Laois, Offaly, Westmeath, Longford)

pain_points: Bought a doorbell weeks ago, still in the box
Chime wiring looks complicated; afraid to break it
Don't want to drill the wrong hole / damage the render
Don't trust DIY tutorials; want a real installer
Don't want a 12-month monitoring contract (Phonewatch / HomeSecure)
Want a known fixed price, not a quote form
primary.buying_stage: decision (already owns or just bought the product)
channels_they_use: Google Search ('ring installer dublin', 'smart doorbell installer near me')

secondary.label: The eldercare adult child
secondary.description: Adult child aged 35-50 of an elderly Dublin/Leinster parent. Worried about break-ins or falls. Researching whether to install a video doorbell + camera at the parent's home, or push them onto Phonewatch, or do nothing.
secondary.key_concern: Parent safety + keeping family connected without a monitoring contract

tone_dos: Direct and transactional ('From €139, this week, no contract')
Specific over vague ('Fitted in 1 hour', '5,000+ installs')
tone_donts: Overstated claims (avoid 'best in Ireland', stick to 'Dublin's #1')
Hard scarcity tactics ('only 3 slots left this week')

visual_identity.imagery_style: Real install photos: hands fitting devices, drilled-and-mounted doorbells on Irish red-brick / pebbledash render walls. Dublin / suburban Leinster context. Avoid stock photos of generic 'happy customers' or American suburban houses. Tidy work shots that show cabling discipline.
visual_identity.logo_treatment: Wordmark on white or slate-900 backgrounds. Brand-500 orange accent. Avoid placing logo over busy install-photo backgrounds.

products_services.name: Ring Doorbell Installation (€139 install-only)
products_services.description: Mounts and configures any Ring video doorbell the customer has bought elsewhere. Wired or battery, all models.

products_services.name: Plus Video Doorbell (supplied + fitted)
products_services.description: Plus-tier video doorbell supplied and professionally installed.

products_services.name: Pro Video Doorbell (supplied + fitted)
products_services.description: Pro-tier video doorbell with Retinal 2K supplied and installed.

products_services.name: Plus / Pro Driveway Bundle
products_services.description: Doorbell + floodlight cam covering driveway approach.

products_services.name: Plus / Pro Whole Home Bundle
products_services.description: Doorbell + multiple cameras for full home coverage.

products_services.name: Eldercare Security Bundle
products_services.description: Doorbell + lockbox combination for elderly parent's home; family peace of mind.

products_services.name: Free Home Consultation
products_services.description: Complimentary in-home consultation to assess Wi-Fi coverage, mounting options, and quote installation.

differentiators: Flat-priced install starting at €139 — no quote forms, no surprises
Brand-agnostic: installs Ring, Eufy, Tapo, Nest, Arlo at the same fee
No contract, no monthly monitoring fee (vs Phonewatch / HomeSecure)
Local Dublin + Leinster trade installer (not a nationwide call-centre brand)
Fitted in approx. 1 hour, app set up on family phones, motion zones tuned, family trained before we leave

main_competitors.name: amazon.ie
main_competitors.smart_space_angle: Convert their post-purchase orphan customers into installs

main_competitors.name: phonewatch.ie
main_competitors.smart_space_angle: No contract, no monitoring fees, one-off install

competitive_positioning.category_we_own: Install-only, brand-agnostic, no-contract local trade installer

trust_signals: Approx. 1-hour installs, family-trained before we leave

current_marketing_state.tracking_health: good (Consent Mode v2 + Enhanced Conversions live)
current_marketing_state.biggest_gap: No Google Business Profile yet (single biggest local-SEO lever, action booked Tue 28 Apr)
